description: You are a VFX compositor preparing the BMW car scene for a product catalog. Create a compositing pipeline that enhances the render with highlight bloom, cinematic warm-cool color grading, and atmospheric depth haze. Configure Cycles at 64 samples, 1920x1080 resolution. Enable the Ambient Occlusion and Mist render passes, with Mist Start at 5.0m and Depth at 25.0m. Build a compositor node network containing: a Fog Glow Glare node for bloom on bright reflections, a Color Balance node applying warm highlights and cool shadows, a Map Value node processing the Mist pass for depth-based fog, and a Mix Color node blending the color-graded image with a blue-grey atmospheric haze using the depth mask as factor. Route the final result to both the Composite output and a File Output node. Render to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/bmw_composited.png and save as /home/ga/BlenderProjects/composited_pipeline.blend.
